text.title: Cloud Commitment Discounts: RIs, Savings Plans, and Spot Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml; mandatory under F-066.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all `Applies If` preconditions satisfied for this input?

branch.question: Is the input scope explicitly named (environment / module / workload)?

conclusion.verdict: apply the methodology end-to-end starting at procedure step 1
reject input — require explicit scope before applying the methodology
return early; this methodology does not apply

text.example: preconditions == true → scope_explicit == true → apply the methodology end-to-end (rule savings-plan-floor).
